Setup
SirJackovich chose tails for the opening coin flip.
OpponentThree won the coin toss.
OpponentThree decided to go first.
SirJackovich drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
   • Mankey, Primeape, Annihilape, Waitress, Basic Fighting Energy, Hilda, Fighting Gong
OpponentThree drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
   • Charizard ex, Charmander, Rare Candy, Energy, Nest Ball, Professor's Research, Iono
SirJackovich played Mankey to the Active Spot.
OpponentThree played Charmander to the Active Spot.

OpponentThree's Turn
OpponentThree drew a card.
OpponentThree played Nest Ball.
- OpponentThree shuffled their deck.

SirJackovich's Turn
SirJackovich drew a card.
SirJackovich evolved Mankey to Primeape in the Active Spot.
SirJackovich played Waitress.
- SirJackovich shuffled their deck.
SirJackovich evolved Primeape to Annihilape in the Active Spot.
SirJackovich's Annihilape used Tantrum on OpponentThree's Charizard ex for 80 damage.

OpponentThree's Turn
OpponentThree's Charizard ex used Burning Darkness on SirJackovich's Annihilape for 300 damage.
SirJackovich's Annihilape was Knocked Out!
OpponentThree took 2 Prize cards.

OpponentThree wins.
